concept.description: Parses the Export-Package manifest header and creates :Osgi:ExportedPackage nodes with EXPORTS_PACKAGE relationships from the bundle.
concept.cypher: MATCH (bundle:Osgi:Bundle)-[:CONTAINS]->(mf:Manifest:File) -[:DECLARES]->(ms:ManifestSection {name: "Main"}) -[:HAS]->(entry:ManifestEntry {name: "Export-Package"}) WITH bundle, split(entry.value, ",") AS exportedPackages UNWIND exportedPackages AS exportedPackage WITH bundle, trim(exportedPackage) AS pkg // Filter out empty entries and version-range fragments from split inside quotes WHERE pkg <> "" AND pkg =~ '^[a-zA-Z].*' WITH bundle, CASE WHEN pkg CONTAINS ";" THEN trim(split(pkg, ";")[0]) ELSE trim(pkg) END AS packageName, CASE WHEN pkg CONTAINS "version=" THEN trim(replace(replace(split(split(pkg, "version=")[1], ";")[0], '"', ''), "'", '')) ELSE null END AS version, pkg AS rawValue MERGE (ep:Osgi:ExportedPackage {fqn: packageName, bundleSymbolicName: bundle.bundleSymbolicName}) MERGE (bundle)-[:EXPORTS_PACKAGE]->(ep) SET ep.rawValue = rawValue, ep.version = version RETURN bundle.bundleSymbolicName AS Bundle, packageName AS ExportedPackage, version AS Version

concept.description: Parses the Import-Package manifest header and creates :Osgi:ImportedPackage nodes with IMPORTS_PACKAGE relationships from the bundle.
concept.cypher: MATCH (bundle:Osgi:Bundle)-[:CONTAINS]->(mf:Manifest:File) -[:DECLARES]->(ms:ManifestSection {name: "Main"}) -[:HAS]->(entry:ManifestEntry {name: "Import-Package"}) WITH bundle, split(entry.value, ",") AS importedPackages UNWIND importedPackages AS importedPackage WITH bundle, trim(importedPackage) AS pkg // Filter out empty entries and version-range fragments from split inside quotes WHERE pkg <> "" AND pkg =~ '^[a-zA-Z].*' WITH bundle, CASE WHEN pkg CONTAINS ";" THEN trim(split(pkg, ";")[0]) ELSE trim(pkg) END AS packageName, CASE WHEN pkg CONTAINS "version=" THEN trim(replace(replace(split(split(pkg, "version=")[1], ";")[0], '"', ''), "'", '')) ELSE null END AS version, pkg AS rawValue, CASE WHEN toLower(pkg) CONTAINS "resolution:=optional" THEN true ELSE false END AS optional MERGE (ip:Osgi:ImportedPackage {fqn: packageName, bundleSymbolicName: bundle.bundleSymbolicName}) MERGE (bundle)-[:IMPORTS_PACKAGE]->(ip) SET ip.rawValue = rawValue, ip.optional = optional, ip.version = version RETURN bundle.bundleSymbolicName AS Bundle, packageName AS ImportedPackage, optional AS Optional, version AS Version

concept.description: Creates SATISFIES relationships from exported packages to imported packages with matching fully qualified names (simulates OSGi package wiring).
concept.cypher: MATCH (ep:Osgi:ExportedPackage), (ip:Osgi:ImportedPackage) WHERE ep.fqn = ip.fqn AND ep.bundleSymbolicName <> ip.bundleSymbolicName AND NOT (ep)-[:SATISFIES]->(ip) CREATE (ep)-[:SATISFIES]->(ip) RETURN ep.fqn AS Package, ep.bundleSymbolicName AS Exporter, ip.bundleSymbolicName AS Importer

concept.description: Parses the Bundle-ClassPath manifest header and stores the embedded classpath entries as a property on the bundle.
concept.cypher: MATCH (bundle:Osgi:Bundle)-[:CONTAINS]->(mf:Manifest:File) -[:DECLARES]->(ms:ManifestSection {name: "Main"}) -[:HAS]->(entry:ManifestEntry {name: "Bundle-ClassPath"}) WITH bundle, [x IN split(entry.value, ",") | trim(x)] AS classPathEntries SET bundle.bundleClassPath = classPathEntries RETURN bundle.bundleSymbolicName AS Bundle, classPathEntries AS ClassPath
